span.p:
Presidio NER + Custom Recognisers
Detect: names · IDs · accounts · spoken-form refs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Token Map Store
In-memory · Encrypted at rest
NEVER leaves environment

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pseudonymised Payload
Names → IND_T001 · Accounts → ACCT_T089
Amounts/dates/types RETAINED

span.p:
External SOTA API
Claude / GPT-4
Reasons on tokens only

span.p:
Tokenised Reasoning Output
No real identifiers

span.p:
Human Checkpoint
Investigator reviews tokenised output
Checks for re-identification risk
